message:
style(ft-xbnl0.2.4): fix clippy doc-lazy-continuation warning (tick 410)

clippy::doc-lazy-continuation fired on the tick-404 HTTP/1.0 test's
doc comment:

    distributed.rs:4634:9 - doc list item without indentation

The lines:
    /// Test server responds with `HTTP/1.0 200 OK` + `Content-Length`
    /// + short body + `Connection: close`. The client must decode
    /// status=200 + body="legacy".

were interpreted as a malformed list because the `+ short body` and
`status=200 + body` lines read like list continuations at clippy's
pattern matcher.

Rewrote to a flat sentence structure:

    /// Test server responds with `HTTP/1.0 200 OK` and a short body
    /// under Content-Length; the client must decode status=200 and
    /// `body="legacy"`.

Verified: distributed.rs is now clippy-clean. The remaining 19
clippy errors in the crate are all in other-agent files (ipc,
runtime, snapshot_engine, workflows/*, robot_sdk_contracts) tracked
by ft-jqvg5.

No semantic / test-code changes — pure doc-comment reflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
